title: How Neural Networks Actually Work
subtitle: From a single neuron to the transformers behind modern LLMs.
source_note: Video metadata is real (resolved via YouTube oEmbed). Clip timestamps are unverified placeholders pending hand-curation.

chapters.title: How a network learns: gradient descent
chapters.intro_text: A network starts random and wrong. Learning is the search for the downhill direction in a space with millions of dimensions.
